title: On a relation to the Riemann Hypothesis and an analytic part for the divisor function
abstract: Let phi(n) denote the Euler totient function. We study the analytic part associated with the summatory function of sigma_1(n) and obtain explicit bounds under the Riemann Hypothesis. In particular, we establish an upper bound of order x^{delta'} exp((log x)/(log log x)), where delta' = max(1/2, delta).
